<!-- {{< include ../../../../shared/includes/math-symbols.qmd >}} -->

\usepackage{upgreek}



<!-- Decorations -->
\newcommand{\circled}[1]{\enclose{circle}{#1}}
<!-- \newcommand{\boxed}[1]{\enclose{box}{#1}} -->



<!-- Shortcuts -->
\newcommand{\lp}{\left(}
\newcommand{\rp}{\right)}
\newcommand{\lb}{\left[}
\newcommand{\rb}{\right]}
\newcommand{\bs}{\boldsymbol}
\newcommand{\mrm}{\mathrm}
\newcommand{\mbb}{\mathbb}
\newcommand{\mcal}{\mathcal}
\newcommand{\msf}{\mathsf}
\newcommand{\vphi}{\varphi}
\newcommand{\vepsilon}{\varepsilon}



<!-- Common -->
\newcommand{\const}{\text{const}}                   <!-- constant -->
\newcommand{\fix}{\text{fix}}                       <!-- fixed -->
\DeclareMathOperator{\sgn}{sgn}                     <!-- signum function -->
\newcommand{\defin}[1]{\overset{\text{def}}{#1}}    <!-- by definition -->



<!-- Logic -->
\newcommand{\true}{\mathsf{T}}          <!-- True (logical constant) -->
\newcommand{\false}{\mathsf{F}}         <!-- False (logical constant) -->
\newcommand{\and}{\wedge}               <!-- Conjunction -->
\newcommand{\or}{\vee}                  <!-- Disjunction -->
\newcommand{\xor}{\veebar}              <!-- Exclusive disjunction -->
\newcommand{\impl}{\Rightarrow}         <!-- Implication -->
\newcommand{\repl}{\Leftarrow}          <!-- Replication -->
\newcommand{\equi}{\Leftrightarrow}     <!-- Equivalence -->



<!-- Sets of Numbers & Constants-->
\newcommand{\setN}{\mathbb{N}}                         <!-- Natural Numbers -->
\newcommand{\setNp}{\mathbb{N}^\star}                  <!-- Positive Integer Numbers -->
\newcommand{\setNo}{\mathbb{N}_0}                      <!-- Non Negative Integer Numbers -->
\newcommand{\setZ}{\mathbb{Z}}                         <!-- Integer Numbers -->
\newcommand{\setQ}{\mathbb{Q}}                         <!-- Rational Numbers -->
\newcommand{\setI}{\mathbb{R}\setminus\mathbb{Q}}      <!-- Irrational Numbers -->
\newcommand{\setR}{\mathbb{R}}                         <!-- Real Numbers -->
\newcommand{\setC}{\mathbb{C}}                         <!-- Complex Numbers -->
\newcommand{\setIm}{\i\mathbb{R}}                       <!-- Imaginary Numbers -->
\newcommand{\e}{\mathrm{e}}                            <!-- Euler number -->
\newcommand{\i}{\mathrm{i}}                            <!-- Imaginary unit -->



<!-- Calculus & Analysis -->
\newcommand{\seq}[2]{\left({#1}_{#2}\right)}                        <!-- Sequence (no indices) -->
\newcommand{\seqq}[3][1]{\left({#2}_{#3}\right)_{{#3}={#1}}^\infty} <!-- Sequence (with indices) -->
\newcommand{\dom}{\mathcal{D}}                          <!-- Domain -->
\newcommand{\img}{\mathcal{E}}                          <!-- Image -->
\newcommand{\tto}{\longrightarrow}                      <!-- Long arrow -->
\newcommand{\xto}{\xrightarrow}                         <!-- Scalable arrow -->
\newcommand{\d}{\mathrm{d}}                             <!-- differential -->



<!-- Linear Algebra -->
\newcommand{\ip}[1]{^{(#1)}}                      <!-- Upper index in parentheses -->
\newcommand{\ib}[1]{^{[#1]}}                      <!-- Upper index in brackets -->
\newcommand{\v}{\mathbf}                          <!-- Vector, matrix (bold font) -->
\newcommand{\tp}{\mathrm{T}}                      <!-- Marix transposition (use with ^) -->



<!-- Probability Theory -->
\newcommand{\prob}{\mathbb{P}}                  <!-- Probability -->
\newcommand{\expect}{\mathbb{E}}                <!-- Expectation (expected value) -->
\newcommand{\dens}[1]{f_{#1}}                   <!-- Density function -->
\newcommand{\pval}{\mathsf{p}}                  <!-- p-value -->
\newcommand{\toas}{\overset{\text{a.s.}}{\to}}  <!-- Convergence almost sure -->
\newcommand{\toprob}{\overset{p}{\to}}          <!-- Convergeence by probability -->
\newcommand{\todist}{\overset{d}{\to}}          <!-- Convergeence by distribution -->



<!-- Distributions -->
\newcommand{\df}{\text{df}}
\newcommand{\normm}{\mathcal{N}}
\newcommand{\norm}[2]{\mathcal{N}(#1, \, #2)}
\newcommand{\pois}[1]{\text{Pois}(#1)}


<!-- Linear Models -->
